scope.goal: A SEO/AI-indexing/analytics build that delivers measurable conversion insight and search-discoverability gains within 30 days, while remaining maintainable indefinitely by a single volunteer developer for a small NZ club brochure site.
scope.constraints: Stack: Next.js 15 + Vercel + GA4 (G-B62VVGCGP1) + Vercel Analytics. Budget zero NZD recurring. No consent banner; footer privacy line only. Locked CSP whitelist must not be broadened. House style: no em dashes in new content. Single volunteer developer maintenance. No infra that needs babysitting. Cookieless tools preferred where possible.
scope.success_criteria: Each remaining build item delivers a question it answers, has zero ongoing maintenance burden, and has been validated as deliverable inside the existing stack. Join funnel tracking specifically answers: of visitors clicking Join on any page, how many reach the external NZDA signup, broken down by source page. Event taxonomy: every event maps to a question someone will actually ask.

issues.title: A001
issues.claim: Resolved: both funnel events now use `join_source_page`.
issues.concrete_alternative: Send `join_source_page` on both `cta_join_internal_click` and `cta_join_external_click`; internal value is the current route template, external value is the stored origin or `direct`. Register `join_source_page` as the GA4 custom dimension.

issues.title: A002
issues.claim: Resolved: external CTA tracking moved earlier than navigation with beacon transport and dedupe.
issues.concrete_alternative: Record the external click on `onPointerDown` with a keyboard `onKeyDown` fallback for Enter/Space, use `transport_type: 'beacon'`, do not prevent default navigation, and dedupe per activation.

issues.title: A003
issues.claim: Resolved: Event/SportsEvent schema removed from this milestone.
issues.concrete_alternative: Use stable `WebPage`, `CollectionPage`, `ContactPage`, `Article`, and shared `SportsOrganization @id`. Only add `Event`/`SportsEvent` if generated from the same maintained data source as visible event content, including `startDate`, `location`, and `organizer`.

issues.title: A004
issues.claim: Resolved: OG image now requires `metadataBase`, dimensions, alt text, route metadata audit, and absolute URL checks.
issues.concrete_alternative: Set `metadataBase` to the canonical production URL, define width/height/alt for `/og.png`, audit route-level metadata overrides, and test generated HTML for every route that has custom metadata.

issues.title: A005
issues.claim: Resolved: CSP audit is now a hard gate with a no-GA4 branch.
issues.concrete_alternative: Add T0: inspect existing CSP. If GA4 is not already allowed, do not add or load gtag; keep Vercel Analytics only and mark GA4 forwarding blocked by the locked CSP constraint, or get an explicit scope change.

issues.title: A006
issues.claim: Resolved: schema validity and rich-result eligibility are now separate checks.
issues.concrete_alternative: Validate all JSON-LD with Schema.org validator or equivalent structured-data parsing tests. Use Google Rich Results Test only for eligible types such as `BreadcrumbList` and supported `Article` markup.

issues.title: A007
issues.claim: Resolved: FID replaced with preview-measurable lab metrics.
issues.concrete_alternative: Use Lighthouse LCP, CLS, and TBT for preview verification. If field data is later available, track INP after the 30-day window.

issues.title: A008
issues.claim: Resolved: README taxonomy table now has auditable columns.
issues.concrete_alternative: Add a README table with columns: question, event name, required props, GA4 custom dimensions, Vercel event, and pass/fail report location.

issues.title: A009
issues.claim: Vercel Custom Events are removed from the funnel path; GA4 is now the only custom-event transport.
issues.concrete_alternative: Add a `VERCEL_CUSTOM_EVENTS_ALLOWED` gate. If GA4 is blocked and Vercel custom events are unavailable, mark the funnel analytics item blocked and request a scope decision.

issues.title: A010
issues.claim: GA4 eligibility now checks runtime `dataLayer` for measurement ID `G-B62VVGCGP1`, not just CSP.
issues.concrete_alternative: T0 should set `GA4_CLIENT_AVAILABLE=true` only if rendered HTML or runtime inspection confirms `G-B62VVGCGP1` is already loaded without adding a new script.

issues.title: A011
issues.claim: Anchor activation is now native `<a href>` with `pointerdown` plus deduped `click` fallback; Space handling removed.
issues.concrete_alternative: Keep the CTA as `<a href>`. Track on `pointerdown` for pointer users and on `click` as a deduped fallback. Do not track Space on anchors.

issues.title: A012
issues.claim: DebugView validation now has Tag Assistant documentation and preview-only `debug_mode`.
issues.concrete_alternative: Use Tag Assistant for manual tests, or add `debug_mode:true` only in localhost/preview analytics events and explicitly exclude it from production.

issues.title: A013 stale D004 contradicts GA4 hard gate
issues.claim: The current decision ledger still says: if GA4 CSP fails, 'drop gtag forwarding and ship Vercel-only.' That directly contradicts Round 3, D005, and D006, because Vercel custom events are out of scope and cannot answer the Join funnel.
issues.required_change: Remove or supersede D004 so the executable plan has one failure path: GA4 unavailable means funnel work is blocked and user decision required.
issues.concrete_alternative: Replace D004 with: 'If GA4 script/connect path or runtime probe fails, do not ship T3-T6/T9; mark NEEDS_USER. Vercel Analytics remains page-view-only and is not a funnel substitute.'

issues.title: A014 T0 probe cannot prove outbound event delivery
issues.claim: T0 only checks that `dataLayer` contains `['config','G-B62VVGCGP1']`. That proves the tag was configured, not that `gtag('event')` produces a network request accepted by GA4. A broken wrapper, blocked collect request, consent/default settings, or runtime CSP issue can still pass T0 and make T3-T6 useless.
issues.required_change: T0 must include an actual test event dispatch and observe the GA4 collect request or DebugView event before unlocking funnel implementation.
issues.concrete_alternative: Add `trackEvent('__analytics_probe', {probe_page: routeTemplate})` in preview only, verify a `google-analytics.com/g/collect` request returns successfully or appears in DebugView, then document PASS/FAIL per `/`, `/range`, `/join`.

decisions.decision: Single funnel dimension `join_source_page` used on both internal and external Join events.
decisions.rationale: GA4 funnel breakdowns require one dimension across steps; split dims cannot be aggregated as one source-page report.

decisions.decision: External Join CTA tracked on `pointerdown` + keyboard activation, with beacon transport and per-activation dedupe.
decisions.rationale: Async analytics on click is lost when navigation begins; pointerdown buys dispatch time, beacon survives unload.

decisions.decision: JSON-LD scope limited to WebPage, CollectionPage, ContactPage, Article, BreadcrumbList, plus the existing home SportsOrganization @id reference. No Event/SportsEvent in this milestone.
decisions.rationale: Event schema requires a maintained data source; club event data is hand-edited HTML that changes weekly. Maintenance burden violates the volunteer-maintainer constraint.

decisions.decision: T0 CSP audit is a hard gate. If GA4 endpoints not in current `connect-src`/`script-src`, drop gtag forwarding and ship Vercel-only.
decisions.rationale: Constraints forbid CSP broadening. The dual-write was a nice-to-have, not a requirement; Vercel Analytics alone answers the funnel question.

decisions.decision: Vercel Custom Events removed from plan entirely. Vercel Analytics retained only for built-in page views (free tier).
decisions.rationale: Vercel docs (https://vercel.com/docs/analytics/limits-and-pricing) confirm Custom Events are Pro/Enterprise. Zero-budget constraint forbids paid tier.

decisions.decision: If GA4_CLIENT_AVAILABLE=false after T0, funnel item (T3-T6, T9) is marked BLOCKED and a NEEDS_USER decision is surfaced before any build work begins.
decisions.rationale: Without GA4 there is no zero-cost path to the funnel question. Better to block and ask than ship dead code.

decisions.decision: GA4 detection is runtime probe of `window.dataLayer` + measurement ID, not CSP grep.
decisions.rationale: CSP allows the script; it does not prove the script ran. The funnel depends on the script having run.
